'''hathate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:quadrillionfold|quadrillionfold]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-th-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:quadrillionfold|quadrillionfold]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| hathate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:hathate|hathate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:hathatesher|hathatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hathatesherĂ«m|hathatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:hathatero|hathatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:hathateshĂ«|hathateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hathateshĂ«m|hathateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokihathatero|gokihathatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokihathateshĂ«|gokihathateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokihathateshĂ«m|gokihathateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gohathankerom|gohathankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gohathankeshĂ«|gohathankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohathankeshĂ«m|gohathankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gohathankeya|gohathankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:hathaterom|hathaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hathatemu|hathatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:hathateya|hathateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokihathaterom|gokihathaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokihathatemu|gokihathatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokihathateya|gokihathateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:hathathate|hathathate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:hathathatesher|hathathatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hathathatesherĂ«m|hathathatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:hathathatero|hathathatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:hathathateshĂ«|hathathateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hathathateshĂ«m|hathathateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokihathathatero|gokihathathatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokihathathateshĂ«|gokihathathateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokihathathateshĂ«m|gokihathathateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gohathathankerom|gohathathankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gohathathankeshĂ«|gohathathankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohathathankeshĂ«m|gohathathankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gohathathankeya|gohathathankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:hathathaterom|hathathaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hathathatemu|hathathatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:hathathateya|hathathateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokihathathaterom|gokihathathaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokihathathatemu|gokihathathatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokihathathateya|gokihathathateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:hĂŠthĂŠte|hĂŠthĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:hĂŠthĂŠtesher|hĂŠthĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hĂŠthĂŠtesherĂ«m|hĂŠthĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:hĂŠthĂŠtero|hĂŠthĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:hĂŠthĂŠteshĂ«|hĂŠthĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hĂŠthĂŠteshĂ«m|hĂŠthĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokihĂŠthĂŠtero|gokihĂŠthĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokihĂŠthĂŠteshĂ«|gokihĂŠthĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokihĂŠthĂŠteshĂ«m|gokihĂŠthĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gohĂŠthĂŠnkerom|gohĂŠthĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gohĂŠthĂŠnkeshĂ«|gohĂŠthĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohĂŠthĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gohĂŠthĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gohĂŠthĂŠnkeya|gohĂŠthĂŠnkeya]]
|-

|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hĂŠthĂŠtemu|hĂŠthĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:hĂŠthĂŠteya|hĂŠthĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokihĂŠthĂŠterom|gokihĂŠthĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokihĂŠthĂŠtemu|gokihĂŠthĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokihĂŠthĂŠteya|gokihĂŠthĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:hafthafte|hafthafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:hafthaftesher|hafthaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hafthaftesherĂ«m|hafthaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:hafthaftero|hafthaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:hafthafteshĂ«|hafthafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hafthafteshĂ«m|hafthafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokihafthaftero|gokihafthaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokihafthafteshĂ«|gokihafthafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokihafthafteshĂ«m|gokihafthafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gohafthafnkerom|gohafthafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gohafthafnkeshĂ«|gohafthafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohafthafnkeshĂ«m|gohafthafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gohafthafnkeya|gohafthafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:hafthafterom|hafthafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hafthaftemu|hafthaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:hafthafteya|hafthafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokihafthafterom|gokihafthafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokihafthaftemu|gokihafthaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokihafthafteya|gokihafthafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
